description: doobie-free_3 is doobie's low-level free-algebra module for representing JDBC operations as pure Scala 3 programs. It exposes functional algebras and interpreters for JDBC objects such as connections, statements, result sets, and metadata so database actions can be composed and interpreted safely.

doobie-free_3 provides doobie's low-level free-algebra layer for modeling JDBC operations as pure Scala 3 programs. It defines functional representations and interpreters for JDBC objects such as connections, statements, result sets, and metadata so database actions can be composed and interpreted safely.

doobie-free_3 provides doobie's low-level free-algebra layer for representing JDBC operations as pure Scala 3 programs. It exposes direct mappings for JDBC objects such as connections, statements, result sets, and metadata so higher-level doobie modules and advanced users can interpret or compose database actions functionally.
